title: The Sign on the Door
writer: Herbert Brenon, Mary Murillo, Channing Pollock
actors: Norma Talmadge, Charles Richman, Lew Cody
plot: Ann Hunniwell, innocently accompanying Frank Devereaux, her employer's son, to a questionable New York cafe, is arrested in a raid and is photographed by a newspaperman, although Devereaux manages to obtain the negative. Five year...
